libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure generated JVM tests to run with `--add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED` and `--add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED`. Do not add an explicit Javassist dependency unless local resolution proves it is missing; `ognl:ognl:3.3.5` declares `org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA` transitively. Avoid globally enabling `ognl.security.manager`; set and restore OGNL system properties only inside tests that specifically exercise that behavior.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: SecurityManager-oriented coverage is fragile on JDK 25 because `System.setSecurityManager` is deprecated/removed-path behavior; such tests should be guarded or avoided unless the failure is specifically in that area.
OGNL expression compilation uses Javassist dynamic class generation, so Native Image behavior may still require metadata even though no setup dependency is needed.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL itself has no external service or extra non-transitive dependency need, but meaningful JVM coverage on modern JDKs should run tests with module opens because OGNL reflectively accesses JDK internals and its own JDK17+ Maven profile uses add-opens.
